message:
chore(gitignore): add .bv/ directory for beads viewer local state

Add gitignore entry for the .bv/ directory, which stores local
configuration and cache files for the beads viewer (bv) tool.

This follows the existing pattern in the project for ignoring
tool-specific local state directories:
- .ubs-cache/ and ubs-report.json for UBS (Ultimate Bug Scanner)
- .agent-mail/ for Agent Mail artifacts
- .mcp-session/ for MCP session data

The .bv/ directory contains machine-specific configuration and
cached data that should not be shared across environments or
committed to version control. Ignoring it prevents accidental
commits of local state and keeps the repository clean for all
contributors.

Also fixes the missing newline at end of file for the previous
ubs-report.json entry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -254,4 +254,7 @@ id_ed25519.pub
 
 # UBS (Ultimate Bug Scanner) artifacts
 .ubs-cache/
-ubs-report.json
\ No newline at end of file
+ubs-report.json
+
+# bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
+.bv/
